evals.prompt: Upload a URL into the user's knowledge graph.
evals.expected_output: An acknowledgement with the new document_id (or an indication that ingestion is async).
assertions: upload_url is called with a single URL
Response is recorded so a follow-up list_documents call can verify ingestion

evals.prompt: Rebuild similarity / cites / mentions edges after a bulk import.
evals.expected_output: Server-side edge rebuild kicked off; response indicates job status or completion.
assertions: rebuild_graph_edges is called only after a bulk import (not on a single document)
User has been warned that the operation is expensive
